L1.area: Stream output formatting and progress reporting infrastructure

L2.description: A race condition vulnerability exists where multiple concurrent operations can simultaneously write progress data to a shared output stream without proper synchronization, leading to data corruption or application crashes.

L3.area: Progress output formatting and serialization for concurrent stream writers
L3.description: A race condition vulnerability exists in the progress output formatter where concurrent write operations targeting the same underlying output stream are not synchronized with a mutex, allowing multiple goroutines to corrupt data or crash the application when reporting progress simultaneously.

ground_truth.reason: The progressOutput type in the streamformatter package writes to an underlying io.Writer without synchronization, allowing concurrent goroutines to interleave writes and cause data corruption or crashes.
